item.title:

Barkley, McGinn and Watkins are all involved befo
item.description:
Aston Villa @AVFCOfficial · 53s The perfect start to the second half
Barkley, McGinn and Watkins are all involved before Rogers takes a wonderful touch and finishes it off! Cita Aston Villa @AVFCOfficial · 2min 0:15 A BEAUTIFUL MORGAN ROGERS GOAL 7 8 44 788

item.title: nickgoff79: Nick Goff @nickgoff79 · 1min Goodison would have been absolutely vile now at 0-1 in the derby. Instead it's silent and a
item.description: Nick Goff @nickgoff79 · 1min Goodison would have been absolutely vile now at 0-1 in the derby. Instead it's silent and all you can see is thousands making their way back to their seats after a lovely sanitised half time experience. Nice stadium, but the club can't ever be the same again. 1 1 72
